imageOptions.style: ultra-detailed photorealistic medical photography, surgical suite and trauma bay realism, 50mm lens depth, high dynamic range, anatomical accuracy, no illustrations or cartoons

safetyConstraints: Preserve all guideline and trial tables exactly as authored.
Do not drop Sources blocks on content slides.
Maintain clinical language for physician audience in preserve mode.

slideTypeDirectives.Title: Full-bleed hero image, centered white text overlay, presenter name and credentials prominent
slideTypeDirectives.Disclosures: Clean minimal layout, dark navy background, white text only, no imagery
slideTypeDirectives.Learning Objectives: Clean minimal layout, dark navy background, numbered list, no imagery
slideTypeDirectives.Case: Split layout: clinical scene imagery left, structured case text right, urgent realistic tone
slideTypeDirectives.Content: Clean professional layout, key message headline zone, bullet hierarchy, sources at bottom
slideTypeDirectives.Data/Table: Data-first layout, bold stats as focal points, full-width tables dominate, high contrast
slideTypeDirectives.Trial: Clinical trial summary layout, PICO framework or results table, key findings highlighted
slideTypeDirectives.Guideline: Side-by-side or full-width comparison table, preserve guideline structure exactly
slideTypeDirectives.MCQ: Quiz card layout, clear A-D option separation, highlight correct answer in green
slideTypeDirectives.Take-Home: Large numbered list, bold key phrases, one concept per line, high-impact typography
slideTypeDirectives.References: Small text 2-column layout, no images, clean numbered list, dense but readable
slideTypeDirectives.Q&A: Professional closing slide, centered text, subtle medical background, contact info if present

typeImageStyles.Title: Dramatic cinematic wide-angle trauma bay or OR establishing shot; hero-scale composition; deep focal clarity; no text overlays
typeImageStyles.Case: Photoreal emergency department or trauma bay scene; multidisciplinary team in action; realistic skin and equipment detail; 16:9; no illustrations
typeImageStyles.Content: Photoreal clinical scene matching slide topic; OR / ICU / ward environment; shallow depth of field; anatomically accurate; no diagrams or icons
typeImageStyles.Data/Table: NO_IMAGE — optional: subtle defocused clinical background, low contrast, no recognizable text
typeImageStyles.Trial: NO_IMAGE — optional: subtle defocused clinical background, low contrast, no recognizable text
typeImageStyles.Guideline: NO_IMAGE — optional: subtle defocused clinical background, low contrast, no recognizable text
typeImageStyles.MCQ: NO_IMAGE — clean quiz card background only
typeImageStyles.Take-Home: Clean clinical conference visual motif; synthesis and decision-support theme; minimal distractions; high contrast
typeImageStyles.Q&A: Professional medical conference closing scene; podium and subtle hospital context; warm inviting tone
